channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Manchin, Sinema prevent Democrats from locking in majority on labor board through 2026
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Senate Democrats failed Wednesday to confirm a Democratic member of the National Labor Relations Board after independent Sens.
item.dc:creator: MATT BROWN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What happens next with Alex Jones' Infowars? No certainty yet after sale to The Onion is rejected
item.description: The Onion's rejected purchase of Infowars in an auction bid supported by families of the Sandy Hook Elementary shooting dealt them a new setback Wednesday and clouded the future of Alex Jones' conspiracy theory platform, which will remain in his control for at least the near future.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Wisconsin kayaker who faked his death and fled the country is charged after returning to US
item.description: GREEN LAKE, Wis. (AP) — A Wisconsin man who faked his own drowning and left his wife and three children for Eastern Europe willingly returned to the U.S. after four months and was charged Wednesday with obstructing an intense lake search for his body.
item.dc:creator: TODD RICHMOND, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Hannah Kobayashi, missing Hawaii woman whose disappearance prompted a massive search, is found safe
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Hannah Kobayashi, the missing Hawaii woman whose disappearance prompted a massive search and a missing persons investigation in Los Angeles, has been found safe, police said Wednesday. Kobayashi vanished last month in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: STEFANIE DAZIO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Albertsons sues Kroger for failing to win approval of their proposed supermarket merger
item.description: Kroger and Albertsons' plan for the largest U.S. supermarket merger in history crumbled Wednesday, with Albertsons pulling out of the $24.6 billion deal and the two companies accusing each other of not doing enough to push their proposed alliance through.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Biden says healthy women help US prosperity as he highlights White House initiative on their health
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden said Wednesday that he is “so proud” that a women's health research initiative he launched last year at his wife's urging has already invested nearly $1 billion because a healthy female population improves U.S. prosperity.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: New Jersey drones: NORTHCOM not yet asked by local officials for help
item.description: Local officials have not yet requested that U.S. Northern Command intervene amid reports of mysterious drone sightings over New Jersey and Staten Island on the East Coast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luxury real estate brokers charged in federal indictment with sex trafficking in NYC
item.description: Two luxury real estate brokers and their brother have been charged in a federal indictment with sex trafficking.
item.dc:creator: Philip Marcelo, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Homeland Security shares new details of mysterious drone flights over New Jersey
item.description: A New Jersey lawmaker from part of the state where several mysterious drones have been spotted in recent week says the devices appear to avoid detection by traditional methods.
item.dc:creator: Bruce Shipkowski, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ohio lawmaker proposes bill to make ‘flag planting’ in Ohio State stadium a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee between the Michigan and Ohio State football teams, an Ohio state lawmaker has introduced a new bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony criminal offense.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, Fox 5

item.title: Increased Christianity in schools opens the door to Satanic Temple education programs
item.description: The Satanic Temple does not seek to convert students toward Satan but wants to be a bulwark against increased religious education.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: Trump, team trail Fauci on trust as medical information source: Survey
item.description: Trump and other Republicans have criticized Fauci, who was the face of the first Trump and Biden administration’s response against COVID-19, over his handling of the pandemic.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5

item.title: GOP Armed Services chair criticizes ban on gender-affirming care for minors in NDAA
item.description: House Armed Services Committee Chair Mike Rogers (R-Ala.) on Tuesday lamented the inclusion of a provision banning coverage of gender-affirming care for minors in the annual defense authorization bill, saying that Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) did not consult him about it.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Albertsons gives up on Kroger merger, sues the grocery chain
item.description: Kroger and Albertsons in 2022 proposed what would be the largest grocery store merger in U.S. history. The companies said a merger would help them better compete with big retailers like Walmart, Costco and Amazon.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The Amazing Kreskin, renowned mentalist and frequent late-night guest, dies at 89
item.description: The Amazing Kreskin, an entertainer and mentalist who rose to fame amid frequent appearances on TV talk shows like “The Tonight Show” and “The Mike Douglas Show,” has died, his family confirmed on social media. He was 89 years old.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Inflation ticks higher as Fed eyes another rate cut
item.description: Inflation picked up slightly in November, according to data released Wednesday by the Labor Department, but likely not by enough to derail the Federal Reserve's plans for another rate cut.
item.dc:creator: Sylvan Lane, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kayaker who faked his death, fled the US charged after returning to Wisconsin
item.description: Police had previously said they believed Borgwardt planned his Aug. 12 disappearance and tried to conceal his efforts to mislead investigations.
item.dc:creator: Indiana Schilz, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Luigi Mangione was reported missing 2 weeks before CEO slain: police
item.description: The parents of Luigi Mangione, the man suspected of shooting and killing UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, told law enforcement that they hadn't heard from their son in months.
item.dc:creator: Video credit: Nicole Johnson, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Rocky Colavito, 9-time All-Star outfielder and one of Cleveland's most popular athletes, dies at 91
item.description: Rocky Colavito, a wildly popular outfielder who was involved in one of the most debated trades in Cleveland sports history, has died. He was 91.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Friends, acquaintances defend Mangione family as media descends on alleged CEO killer's hometown
item.description: Alleged CEO killer Luigi Mangione's family has a deep footprint in the state of Maryland, and friends and acquaintances of the Mangiones say they were shocked at the news of Luigi's arrest.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO murder suspect intends to plead not guilty: lawyer
item.description: Alleged UnitedHealthcare CEO shooter Luigi Mangione was arrested at a Pennsylvania McDonald's on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump assassination attempt suspect Routh's legal team considers insanity defense
item.description: Trump assassination suspect Ryan Routh appeared for a hearing on Wednesday, where his legal team said it is considering the insanity defense.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Increased Christianity in schools opens the door to Satanic Temple education programs
item.description: The in-school offerings are in addition to the After School Satan Clubs, which launched in 2020 and have risen in popularity among parents seeking alternatives to religious clubs.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Firefighters struggle to contain fast-moving Malibu wildfire, prompting evacuation orders
item.description: Firefighters in Malibu are struggling to gain control the fast-moving Franklin Fire, which is 0% contained as of late Tuesday night after burning more than 3,000 acres in about 24 hours.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego sheriff defies new policy to limit cooperation with immigration officials
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — The sheriff of the nation’s fifth-largest county on Tuesday defied a new policy to limit cooperation with federal immigration authorities, setting up a showdown over a new obstacle to President-elect Donald Trump’s mass deportation plans.
item.dc:creator: ELLIOT SPAGAT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fire danger diminishes in Southern California even as crews continue to battle Malibu blaze
item.description: Weather conditions have improved enough in Southern California for forecasters to say that the worst of the high winds that drove a wildfire through part of Malibu have passed.
item.dc:creator: Jae C. Hong, Eric Thayer And Stefanie Dazio, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: After acquittal in subway chokehold trial, Daniel Penny says he was vulnerable in the encounter
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — After being acquitted of homicide, the military veteran who choked a volatile, mentally ill man on a New York subway told an interviewer he put himself in a “very vulnerable position” but felt compelled to act.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ and SANYA MANSOOR, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Kylie Kelce dethrones Joe Rogan on podcast charts as her debut episode hits No. 1
item.description: Kylie Kelce, wife of former NFL player turned media personality Jason Kelce, beat out Joe Rogan for the top podcast spot on both Apple and Spotify this week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Kennedy Center pays tribute to Coppola, the Grateful Dead, Raitt, Sandoval and The Apollo
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — “Not Fade Away” closed out the Kennedy Center Honors at this year's ceremony, just as honorees The Grateful Dead had used Buddy Holly’s ode to enduring love to close out hundreds of concerts over the years.
item.dc:creator: ASHRAF KHALIL and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, Fox 5
